title: From Arizona to Texas: Ranking the remaining teams in the men's Sweet 16
content: Six Big Ten teams! Upset-minded Texas! Buzzer-beaters and blowouts! Here's how the Sweet 16 teams stack up.

title: Your guide to men's March Madness Day 4: Recaps, every winner's chance to advance
content: The Sweet 16 is set. Here's how Iowa, St. John's and more teams advanced -- and their chances of doing it again.

title: Iowa takes down defending champ UF in thriller
content: Alvaro Folgueiras nailed a 3-pointer with 4.5 seconds remaining as Iowa eliminated defending national champion Florida in the second round of the men's NCAA tournament.

title: Darling calls own shot to keep St. John's dancing
content: Dylan Darling's layup as time expired sent St. John's to its first Sweet 16 since 1999 with a 67-65 win over Kansas in the men's NCAA tournament.

title: Kentucky out with its worst tourney loss since '72
content: The Wildcats' 19-point loss in an 82-63 defeat against Iowa State was Kentucky's largest in an NCAA tournament game since 1972.

title: TCU outlasts UW in OT, heads back to Sweet 16
content: Olivia Miles had 18 points and 10 rebounds, and TCU overcame Washington for a 62-59 overtime victory Sunday night that sent the Horned Frogs to the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA tournament for the second year in a row.

title: Booker dominates Oregon with 40 in Texas win
content: Madison Booker scored a career-high 40 points in a dazzling display of shotmaking and No. 1 Texas rolled past No. 8 Oregon 100-58.

title: Self noncommittal about future as Kansas coach
content: Longtime Kansas coach Bill Self said after Sunday's season-ending loss to St. John's that he has not yet made a decision about his coaching future, later adding that any decision will be based solely on his health.

title: Ohtani jersey from WBC goes for record $1.5M
content: The jersey two-way Japanese star Shohei Ohtani wore during the country's 13-0 win over Chinese Taipei in the World Baseball Classic on March 6 sold for $1,500,010 via MLB Auctions on Sunday night -- the most ever paid for a Ohtani jersey at auction.

title: Hockey world mourns loss of Wild reporter Pierce
content: Jessi Pierce, who covered the Wild as the correspondent for NHL.com for the past decade. and her three children were killed Saturday in a house fire in Minnesota.

title: 😈 Haliburton trolls Kentucky alums after ISU win
content: John Calipari, who most of Kentucky's active NBA contingent played for in Lexington, coaches Arkansas these days.

title: Women's March Madness Day 3 takeaways: How half the Sweet 16 was set
content: All the better seeds won Sunday as half the Sweet 16 was set. We broke down how each winner can keep advancing.

title: Women's March Madness live updates: Previews, action from Monday's second round
content: How do the teams in Monday's second round match up? We're tracking all eight games as the Sweet 16 is set.

title: The moves that rocked the MLB offseason -- and what they mean for the 2026 season
content: Kyle Tucker got how much from the Dodgers!? Pete Alonso left the Mets for WHERE!? It's time to get up to speed after a wild winter.

title: Ranking the 10 best and 10 worst NBA transactions since last summer
content: Bradley Beal to the Clippers? Jared McCain to the Thunder!? We ranked the best and worst moves since last offseason.

title: What has changed for Jack Hughes one month after Olympic golden goal?
content: The moment was surreal for the Devils' center and his teammates. The weeks after have been a roller-coaster.

title: NHL playoff watch: Projecting Senators' wild-card chances -- and who should be scared
content: Can Ottawa claim a spot to the dance? Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Sunday.

title: How often do splashy NFL free agent signings pan out? Why big money doesn't always mean stardom
content: Let's look at the largest contracts from 2013 to 2022 to see how often megadeals meet expectations, from Tom Brady to Brock Osweiler.

title: Will Daniel Jones return to form? Colts are banking on it
content: Indy made a huge investment in Jones recovering from his Achilles injury, and so far, signs are positive.

title: Hyo Joo Kim edges Nelly Korda for wire-to-wire Founders win
content: Hyo Joo Kim held off Nelly Korda on Sunday at Sharon Heights to complete a wire-to-wire victory in the Fortinet Founders Cup.

title: Women's tournament: Lines, totals and BPI for Monday's games
content: Money lines, spreads, totals and BPI for Monday's games in the women's college basketball tournament.

title: Carabao Cup reality check for Arsenal, Man City; Madrid's bravery rewarded in derby
content: Man City got the better of Arsenal. Will this impact their Premier League battle? Meanwhile, Real Madrid's bravery is rewarded in the derby and the mess at Chelsea continues.

title: No plan, no fight: Spurs hurtling toward relegation after limp loss to Forest
content: The thousand-yard stare has become the only guarantee at Tottenham, and it's staring into the abyss of relegation.

title: Rare air: Tyler Reddick in elite club with Darlington win
content: The "Track Too Tough To Tame" tested Tyler Reddick in every way possible Sunday, and this year's top star in NASCAR naturally passed with flying colors for his fourth victory of the season.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United eyeing Arsenal's Lewis-Skelly
content: Manchester United are looking for a new left back, with Arsenal's Myles Lewis-Skelly among the targets. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: My fight is about Viveka’s murder, not property: Sharmila
content: AP Congress chief says her focus is on securing justice in the murder case, alleges attempts to mislead probe and rejects YSRCP’s property dispute charge

title: Over 6,800 pedestrian deaths in Karnataka in three years, data shows
content: A year-wise analysis of the data shows that pedestrian fatalities have remained consistently high. In 2022, the State reported 2,105 deaths, which rose sharply to 2,418 in 2023 before slightly declining to 2,321 in 2024 (provisional).

title: Gujarat digitises 20 high-demand citizen services
content: Based on recommendations of the Gujarat Administrative Reforms Committee, about 4% of services on the Digital Gujarat platform are now enabled for complete end-to-end digital delivery

title: Assembly Elections LIVE: NDA's final seat share in Tamil Nadu expected tonight; BJP to contest in 27 seats, PMK in 18
content: Assam Congress chief Gaurav Gogoi filed his nomination papers from the Jorhat Assembly seat on March 23, making his debut electoral foray in the State polls.

title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE: FTA's increased trade volume, but also increased trade deficit, says DMK member Arun Nehru
content: Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill, 2026, introduced in Lok Sabha, JPC to examine it; Rajya Sabha discussing Appropriation No. 2 Bill, 2026

title: Gautham Vasudev Menon loses case in Madras High Court, ordered to pay ₹4.25 crore to R.S. Infotainment
content: A Division Bench dismisses his appeal against a single judge’s order to pay ₹4.25 crore to a production house with interest at the rate of 12% per annum from May 2010

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: Coastal residents of Kanniyakumari and Nagercoil constituencies voice discontent
content: Around 15 coastal villages fall under the jurisdiction of the Kanniyakumari and Nagercoil constituencies but residents of most of them say they are dissatisfied with the projects implemented

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: PIB booklet on State’s electoral history released ahead of polls
content: The 201-page booklet in Malayalam showcases fascinating episodes and nuggets from the earliest legislative bodies in Travancore, Cochin, and Malabar to Kerala’s first Communist Ministry and up to the 2021 Assembly elections

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Velachery constituency residents demand desilting of lake as flooding, infra issues remain major concerns
content: Velachery, which became a separate constituency in 2008, lags behind on various fronts, say residents; they are worried by the routine flooding of the area, poor road conditions, and heavy traffic congestion caused largely by encroachments

title: More women deleted from rolls in most States after SIR
content: Tamil Nadu is the only major State where the gender ratio improved slightly, despite the State recording one of the largest reductions in total electors

title: Nine workers injured as cold storage facility collapses in Prayagraj, ammonia leak reported
content: Following the collapse, ammonia gas began leaking from the facility, prompting emergency response measures

title: IADVL, APSI raise concerns over patient safety in aesthetic and hair transplant procedures
content: Warn of safety risks in Dental Council of India nod to Master of Dental Surgery doctors to perform such surgeries

title: No proposal for complete loan waiver for farmers: Sitharaman
content: The government has taken several measures to strengthen the economic conditions of the farmers, Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman said

title: BJP to launch ‘Mana Ooru–Mana Jenda’ campaign across A.P. from April 6: PVN Madhav
content: Highlighting the party’s 75-year journey from Jana Sangh to BJP, the party State president said the programme would focus on strengthening grassroots connect and promoting the vision of ‘Viksit Bharat’

title: T.N. Assembly election: Who is eligible to cast a postal ballot?
content: The ECI has notified that electors above the age of 85 years and persons with disabilities may cast their vote through a postal ballot

title: PM Modi did not say anything new, discussion on West Asia should happen in Parliament: Priyanka Gandhi
content: “The notice we have given for discussion should happen so that we can also reply and all sides can put forward their views. It would be good that a discussion happens in Parliament,” Ms. Gandhi said

title: Decomposed body of 25-year-old man found inside stone quarry in Dindigul
content: His family members demanded the closure of the stone quarry and sought a detailed investigation into the incident

title: Organisational changes are being made to reach every part of India, says Sunil Ambekar of RSS
content: “The core idea has always been that this is a Hindu nation, where Hindutva is understood as a way of life. This way of life is not opposed to anyone, nor is it meant to eliminate or harm others,” says Sunil Ambekar

title: Never sought bribe from Shah Rukh Khan to spare his son in drugs case: IRS officer Sameer Wankhede
content: Mr. Wankhede's counsel was arguing the Indian Revenue Service (IRS) officer’s petition seeking to quash the FIR registered against him in May 2023 by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) on charges of corruption and bribery

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: AIADMK facing its biggest test in 53 years
content: In nine years since becoming the party’s pivotal figure in February 2019, Mr. Palaniswami has only two instances of saving grace: his ability to retain power by winning in nine Assembly constituencies out of 22 which had by-polls during April-May 2019, and the party’s victory in two by-polls in Nanguneri and Virkavandi later that year

title: Lok Sabha refers Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill to JPC
content: Opposition said that the legislation sought to dilute the provisions of law under which companies mandatorily have to pay 2% of their profits towards corporate social responsibility (CSR)

title: West Asia situation 'worrisome', having adverse impact on economy, people: PM Modi in Lok Sabha
content: PM Modi says, “Dialogue and diplomacy are solutions to West Asia crisis, our efforts are aimed at reducing tensions and ending conflict”

title: Assam Assembly elections: Gaurav Gogoi files nomination from Jorhat
content: Mr. Gogoi visited the religious places of all communities before starting his rally from Jorhat stadium

title: Implementation of revised pay scales to Telangana employees likely to take some more time
content: Tenure of the Pay Revision Commission extended till this month end, says Deputy CM. The Government Government is likely to take a decision on the implementation of its recommendations after receiving the report

title: Death of trainee vet: Shivamogga veterinarians blame the ‘system’, seek action against officials responsible
content: The Shivamogga zoo authority had recruited a veterinarian with no post-graduation in treating wildlife, on a contractual basis and then placed two newly recruited apprentices, including Dr. Sameeksha Reddy, under the veterinarian, they alleged.

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: CPI(M), Congress accuse each other of fragmenting ‘LDF-UDF duopoly’ in Kerala by aiding BJP
content: Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan accuses Congress national leadership under Rahul Gandhi of playing as BJP’s ‘B-Team’. AICC general secretary K.C. Venugopal says PM Modi and Amit Shah have found ‘a willing tool’ in Pinarayi Vijayan to attack Rahul Gandhi, who is ‘fighting a lone battle against Sangh Parivar and its corporate backers’

title: J. Anuradha takes over as UoH in-charge Vice-Chancellor
content: She served as Head of the Department of Dance and Dean of the Sarojini Naidu School of Arts and Communication

title: LPG shortage: About 20% of hotel industry needs will be met daily with immediate effect, announces Karnataka Minister
content: As many as 10,000 cylinders will be given daily to hotels, industrial canteens, restaurants and dhabas among others, said Food and Civil Supplies Minister K.H. Muniyappa

title: Relief for Vellappally Natesan as Kerala HC Division Bench stays single judge order disqualifying SNDP Yogam leaders
content: While ordering their disqualification, the single judge had earlier held that the Yogam failed to file audited accounts for three consecutive years

title: Mohanlal to feature in Priyadarshan’s 100th film
content: Interestingly, the superstar had also starred Priyadarshan’s debut film, ‘Poochakkoru Mookkuthi’ in 1984

title: TN Polls: Piyush Goyal says NDA seat-sharing to be finalised today, expresses confidence of victory
content: Union Minister Piyush Goyal said seat-sharing discussions within the NDA for the upcoming Tamil Nadu Assembly elections would be finalised today, as negotiations entered a decisive phase in Chennai.

title: Telangana joins ‘Vahan’ platform, scraps 2% tax on second vehicle
content: Stating that around 1,500 new vehicles are added to roads in Telangana every day, Transport Minister says it makes the adoption of modern technology essential for efficient data management and governance

title: Kerala elections: Chennithala alleges ‘deal’ between Pinarayi, Modi, Amit Shah to defeat Congress-led UDF
content: Senior Congress leader says the deal is ‘evident’ in Ettumanoor and Palakkad constituencies, going by the candidates fielded by NDA

title: Nothing left in matter: Supreme Court disposes plea by Sonam Wangchuk's wife against his detention
content: A Bench of Justices Aravind Kumar and PB Varale noted that the Centre revoked its order of Mr. Wangchuk's detention on March 14

title: Delhi’s per capita income to grow at 7.09%: Economic Survey of Delhi 2025-26
content: “Government of NCT of Delhi is budgeted to have a Fiscal Deficit of ₹13,703 Crore in BE 2025-26, which is mainly on the account of increase of more than double (145%) in capital expenditure over 2024-25,” the report said

title: India’s gem, jewellery sector aims to increase domestic sales by up to 15% in 2026 to offset war impact on exports
content: Gem and Jewellery Export Promotion Council and the industry are doing everything possible to increase domestic consumption and sales by at least 10 to 15% during 2026 in order to offset the possible impacts of the war in West Asia on exports

title: Generic semaglutide widens access, but doctors warn of misuse and quality risks
content: In a year or two, only those with the ability to manufacture and maintain quality will remain. Others may exit, says K.V.S. Hari Kumar, endocrinologist and secretary of the Endocrine Society of India

title: Indore house fire: Autopsy confirms all eight deaths caused by burns, suffocation, say police
content: After the incident, relatives of the deceased alleged negligence in the rescue operation and expressed suspicion that an electric current had spread through the house

title: CCB unearths fake government jobs racket, arrests a couple in Bengaluru
content: The couple is suspected of cheating over 100 people by promising Central government and State government jobs, swindling crores of rupees

title: From 48-hr ultimatum to 5-day pause: Trump cites ‘productive’ US-Iran talks, halts infra strikes
content: US President Donald Trump announced a five-day pause on planned military strikes against Iran, citing "very good and productive" talks. This follows a 48-hour ultimatum to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Iran stated the strait remains open to non-enemy vessels, prioritizing diplomacy but demanding an end to aggression. The conflict has escalated with missile deployments and rising casualties.

title: The 'buried' love stories: Lives lost in the name of ‘honour’
content: A wave of alleged honor killings across India sees families brutally murdering young couples who defy caste, interfaith, or societal norms. From UP's Moradabad to Gujarat's Rajkot, lovers are lured, attacked, and disposed of, highlighting a grim clash between personal choice and entrenched traditions. These premeditated acts underscore a disturbing national pattern.

title: Terror threat rocks Pakistan's PSL: Foreign players asked to 'withdraw immediately'
content: The development comes a day after the league was reduced to a closed-door event at two venues — Karachi and Lahore — amid the ongoing West Asia situation and related security issues.

title: H-1B visa registration dip 30-50%: Here are the companies that are emerging as ‘favourites’
content: H-1B visa registrations for FY27 saw a 30-50% drop, reflecting employer caution due to higher fees and a new wage-based lottery. This shift benefits mid-tier IT firms and U.S. Master's degree holders, leveling the playing field against large outsourcing giants and prioritizing specialized talent.

title: Humpy on candidates' pull-out: ‘Would FIDE hold tournaments in Kashmir?’
content: Indian Grandmaster (GM) Koneru Humpy withdrew from the FIDE Women’s Candidates in Cyprus citing safety concerns amid Middle East tensions and Level 3 travel advisories. She prioritised security over competing, despite potential fines and lost title chances. Criticising FIDE for not reconsidering the venue, Humpy called the decision mentally taxing but necessary, urging fans to understand her stance.

title: Oil price dips! Brent slips below $100 as Trump delays strike on Iranian power plants
content: Oil prices experienced a sharp decline as President Trump ordered a five-day halt to planned military strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure, easing fears of Middle East conflict escalation. Brent crude fell over 13%, and WTI slid significantly, reversing earlier gains driven by concerns over disrupted oil transit routes.

title: Rs 14L cr wiped out! Sensex down over 1,800 points down - top reasons for market crash
content: Stock market crash today: Nifty50 and BSE Sensex plunged in opening trade on Monday with oil prices continuing to remain high amid the ongoing US-Iran war. Investor sentiment continues to weaken amid escalating tensions between Iran and the US, a falling rupee, and other global concerns.

title: Jeff Bezos' ex-wife makes another 'record-setting gift of $42 million'
content: Philanthropist Mackenzie Scott has gifted Elizabeth City State University a record $42 million, the largest per-student donation to an HBCU among her recent contributions. This significant sum, nearly triple her 2020 gift, arrives as the university launches its five-year strategic plan.

title: Exclusive: 6 days before start, MI's Bumrah checks into the BCCI CoE
content: Jasprit Bumrah has arrived at the BCCI Centre of Excellence in Karnataka, with his presence not confirmed to be injury-related or for routine checks. This comes as Mumbai Indians' T20 World Cup winning players, including Bumrah, were granted an extended break. MI's IPL 2026 campaign begins against KKR on March 29.

title: Ghosts in Hormuz: How 'zombie’ ships are slipping through the Gulf blockade
content: Two "zombie ships," sailing under the identities of scrapped vessels, have reportedly transited the Strait of Hormuz amid escalating Middle East tensions. This tactic, seen with an oil tanker and an LNG carrier, suggests desperate measures by shipowners to move cargo through the war-hit chokepoint, raising concerns about global energy flows.

title: Protests outside Anthropic, OpenAI and xAI offices in US; What organisers want from CEOs
content: Dozens of protestors gathered outside AI company offices in San Francisco, urging CEOs to publicly commit to pausing frontier AI development if other leading companies do the same. Organized by Stop the AI Race, the movement highlights concerns about AI's potential risks, including human extinction, echoing sentiments from some lab leaders themselves.

title: IPL over PSL: Players' 'pay hike' demands give Pakistan Cricket Board massive headache
content: The Pakistan Cricket Board faces significant challenges ahead of the PSL due to contract breaches and player withdrawals for the more lucrative IPL. Several overseas players have opted out, prompting the PCB to consider strict actions like bans, though the pay disparity with the IPL remains a major hurdle.

title: Travis Kelce vows to uncover truth behind Taylor Swift wedding leak
content: Travis Kelce is reportedly investigating a leak involving his wedding plans with Taylor Swift, after private details surfaced publicly. The breach has upset Swift and raised concerns about trust within their inner circle. With a summer ceremony expected at Swift’s Rhode Island estate, the couple is now reassessing security and access. The situation has shifted focus from celebration to control, as Kelce works quietly to identify the source and protect what remains private.

title: Hormuz blocked, Yanbu rises: Saudi's inland pipeline keeps oil flowing
content: As the Middle East conflict disrupts global energy supplies, Saudi Arabia has activated its 1,200-kilometer East-West pipeline to maintain oil exports. This crucial inland route, rerouting crude to the Red Sea port of Yanbu, is now a pivotal alternative to the closed Strait of Hormuz, ensuring continued market access despite escalating tensions and past attacks.

title: 'Situation worrisome': PM Modi clears India's stand on Iran war, flags impact of Hormuz disruption
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed the Lok Sabha on the West Asian crisis, highlighting its negative impact on the global economy and India. He assured that the government is providing full support to the nearly one crore Indians living and working in the Gulf region, with missions in constant contact and advisories being issued.

title: Rajasthan Board RBSE Class 10 result 2026 tomorrow: key details
content: Rajasthan Board Class 10 results for 2026 are set to be announced tomorrow, March 24th, by the Board of Secondary Education Rajasthan. Over 10 lakh students who appeared for the examinations can check their scores online on official websites or via DigiLocker. The results will be declared at the board headquarters in Ajmer.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office day 5: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 700 cr global gross
content: The global box office has been set ablaze by Aditya Dhar’s espionage epic, 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge,' which officially crossed the Rs. 691 crore mark in worldwide gross collections on its first Monday. As of Day 5 live tracking on March 23, 2026, the Ranveer Singh-starrer has maintained a rock-solid weekday hold. Despite a massive 229-minute runtime and an 'A' certificate, the film featuring Singh as the elite agent Jaskirat Singh Rangi alias Hamza has outperformed the opening trajectories of blockbusters like 'RRR' and 'KGF: Chapter 2.' The high-octane thriller is currently eyeing the Rs. 700 crore global milestone.

title: 'Stop, stop, stop!': Cockpit audio captures final moments of pilots killed in Air Canada crash
content: An Air Canada Express plane crashed into a fire truck at LaGuardia Airport, killing the pilot and co-pilot. Cockpit audio reveals confused instructions and repeated warnings to a vehicle to stop moments before the collision. The incident forced the airport's closure and initiated investigations by aviation authorities.

title: Iran war: PM Modi lists key steps taken on oil & LPG supply - warns of lasting fallout
content: PM Modi pointed out that cargo movement through the Strait of Hormuz has been challenging since the conflict began, but the government is taking steps to ensure that supplies of gas and fuel face minimal disruption.

title: 'Gambhir does not need to be rude, rough because he is a good man': Ganguly
content: Sourav Ganguly lauded Gautam Gambhir's coaching success, highlighting his T20 World Cup and Champions Trophy wins. While acknowledging Gambhir's aggressive style, Ganguly believes he doesn't need to be rude, calling him a "good man" and a competitor. Ganguly expressed confidence in Gambhir improving his Test coaching, especially on good wickets, and expects him to master away tours.

title: Candace Owens dragged into Charlie Kirk text leak as scrutiny grows
content: Claims have emerged that Joe Kent leaked Charlie Kirk’s private messages to Candace Owens through an internal chain involving Turning Point USA figures. The texts, sent shortly before Kirk’s death, revealed tensions over donor pressure and political direction. Kent denies leaking them, but the controversy has intensified scrutiny and sparked backlash across conservative and pro-Israel circles.

title: IPL 2026: Jitesh smokes 81 off 37; Kohli strikes at 241 in RCB warm-up
content: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru held their first warm-up game for IPL 2026, with Virat Kohli showing good form. Jitesh Sharma starred with a blistering 81, while Rajat Patidar sealed the win for Team Krunal. RCB begin their title defence against Sunrisers Hyderabad on March 28, facing player unavailability.

title: BSEB Bihar Board inter arts toppers 2026: Nishu Kumari tops with 95.80%
content: Bihar School Examination Board announced Class 12 results today. The overall pass percentage is 85.19 percent. Nishu Kumari secured the first position in the Arts stream. Examinations were conducted from February 2 to February 13, 2026. Evaluation was completed in 25 days. Students can check results on the official BSEB website.

title: More relief coming soon? Two India-flagged LPG ships transit Strait of Hormuz: Report
content: The vessels, Jag Vasant and Pine Gas, both classified as very large gas carriers, moved northward from the UAE coast toward Iran’s Qeshm and Larak islands early on Monday.

title: Iran’s supreme leader in the shadows: CIA hunts for signs of Mojtaba Khamenei
content: Global intelligence agencies, including the CIA and Mossad, are closely monitoring Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei, who has remained largely out of public view since assuming power. Reports suggest he may have been injured, leading to uncertainty about his authority and the true command structure in Tehran amidst ongoing targeted strikes.

title: 'Illegal, inhuman': Iran sticks Spanish PM's 'no war' message on missiles targeting Israel
content: Iran has used Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez's anti-war statements on missiles targeting Israel. Images show these messages in English and Persian on weaponry. Sanchez's condemnation of the conflict as illegal and inhuman has gained international attention. This action highlights Spain's opposition to the ongoing military operations. Iran continues its struggle with Israeli-American forces.

title: Rupee nears 94-mark vs USD: Middle East tensions drag currency to new low, what's next?
content: Middle East tensions are significantly impacting global financial markets, pushing the Indian Rupee to record lows near 94 against the US dollar.  Analysts believe crude oil prices and geopolitical developments, particularly concerning the Strait of Hormuz, will dictate the currency's next move. The Reserve Bank of India is expected to intervene to manage volatility.

title: Bihar Board Inter Science Toppers 2026: Aman tops with 96.20%
content: Bihar School Examination Board has announced Class 12 Inter results for 2026. Aditya Prakash Aman secured the top position in the Science stream. Girls outperformed boys, showcasing the impact of government initiatives. Over six lakh answer sheets were evaluated swiftly. Students can now access their marksheets online. The results highlight consistent academic excellence and Bihar's focus on equitable education.

title: When Sachin said no but Dada said, ‘Let’s go’ - The story of T-shirt celebration
content: BCCI vice-president Rajeev Shukla revealed that Sourav Ganguly's iconic T-shirt twirl at Lord's in 2002 was initially intended as a team celebration. However, Sachin Tendulkar advised against it, deeming it inappropriate. Ganguly proceeded alone, creating a memorable cricketing moment after India's NatWest Trophy win.

title: LPG crisis: Argentina emerges as key supplier as shipments double in early 2026
content: Argentina has increased its supply of LPG to India as shortages emerge following disruptions caused by the West Asia conflict, according to people aware of the development.

title: 'Reacher' star Alan Ritchson faces backlash after viral punch video: Report
content: Actor Alan Ritchson, known for his action-packed role in 'Reacher,' is at the center of controversy after an altercation with Tennessee neighbor Ronnie Taylor. Reports indicate that the clash ignited when Ritchson's motorcycle allegedly sped through the area, prompting Taylor’s outrage. A video capturing the chaotic moment has gone viral, showing Ritchson engaging in a physical confrontation.

title: What made Kuldeep Yadav emotional? Spinner's candid revelation at TOISA 2025
content: Kuldeep Yadav reflects on India's consecutive T20 World Cup triumphs, calling it an incredible feeling. He highlights his father's encouragement as his career's biggest moment and was moved by Sanju Samson's crucial World Cup knock. Yadav is focused on taking wickets for Delhi Capitals in the IPL and gradually preparing for the ODI World Cup.

title: Bitcoin falls below $70,000 mark, Middle East conflict drags down cryptocurrencies
content: The Middle East conflict is impacting global markets, causing a sell-off in cryptocurrencies and pushing Bitcoin below $70,000. Rapid liquidations and macroeconomic pressures like elevated oil prices are weighing on digital assets. Analysts suggest a cautious consolidation phase, with short-term volatility expected to persist due to geopolitical events and reduced US rate cut expectations.

title: Dhoni to play for CSK till 60! His 'I can try' reply sends fans into frenzy
content: Fans eagerly await MS Dhoni's IPL future, with many hoping he continues beyond 2026. When questioned about retirement, the former CSK captain offered a subtle hint, stating, "It is very difficult. It is on the way down, not on the way up. But I will try," sparking thunderous applause from the excited crowd.

title: Pilot, co-pilot killed in Air Canada jet collision with fire truck at New York airport
content: An Air Canada Express CRJ-900 plane collided with a fire truck on Runway 4 while landing at New York's LaGuardia Airport. The incident, reported by FlightRadar24, led the FAA to halt all flights at the airport. Several injuries are feared, with more details pending.

title: Gold price today: How much 18K, 22K and 24K gold costs in your city? Check prices
content: Gold futures experienced a significant sell-off, dropping by Rs 8,089 to Rs 1.36 lakh per 10 grams on Monday, mirroring global trends. This decline, attributed to inflation fears and a stronger US dollar, marks the fourth consecutive week of losses for the yellow metal. Analysts anticipate continued downward pressure amid geopolitical tensions and potential interest rate hikes.

title: Breaking down the men's hockey tournament: Who will make it to Vegas?
content: the 2025-26 men's college hockey campaign has seen the balance of power firmly entrenched in the Midwest and West . the NCHC and Big Ten dominated the top of the national rankings virtually the entire season . Michigan State, which won the conference's regular-season title, also earned a no. 1 seed .

title: Oil Plunges Over 10%, Stocks Rebound After Trump Hints At Iran War Pause
content: Oil prices plunged and European stocks rebounded Monday after US President Donald Trump ordered a halt to strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure after claiming...

title: Never Demanded Bribe From Shah Rukh Khan: Sameer Wankhede To Bombay Court
content: Wankhede was responding to the central allegation in a Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) FIR that he and others had demanded Rs 25 crore from Shah Rukh Khan.

title: Analysis: How The Left Fell Off Bengal's Political Map
content: This disaster for the Left was preceded by its poor showing two years earlier in the 2019 Lok Sabha elections. During that cycle, the CPM and its allies plummeted to a 6.28% vote share with just three parliamentary seats, yielding almost the entire o

title: "Unacceptable": Supreme Court Pulls Up Probe Agencies In Anil Ambani Bank Fraud Case
content: The Supreme Court has asked the ED to inform it if any state authority or institution fails to cooperate with the investigation.

title: Trump Hints At Possible Middle East Breakthrough, Then Iran Rubs It In
content: Iran War Live News: No Military Strikes Against Iranian Power Plants For 5-Day Period, Says Trump, Then Adds A Caveat

title: A Covid Reminder In PM Modi's Rundown Of Middle East War Impact On India

title: How Surat's Yoga Guru Defrauded Hundreds Under Guise Of Ayurveda

title: What returning production looks like for the 2026 college football season
content: the more continuity and experience you return from last season, the more likely you are to improve . it's still better to return a lot of your production than a little, even if last year's headliner bombed . a combination of injuries, tactical stagnation and disappointing development held back the Tigers .

title: Where Earth’s gold came from: Space explosions keep the universe making more gold
content: The TOI Science Desk stands as an inquisitive team of journalists, ceaselessly delving into the realms of discovery to curate a captivating collection of news, features, and articles from the vast and ever-evolving world of science for the readers of The Times of India. Consider us your scientific companion, delivering a daily dose of wonder and enlightenment. Whether it's the intricacies of genetic engineering, the marvels of space exploration, or the latest in artificial intelligence, the TOI Science Desk ensures you stay connected to the pulse of the scientific world. At the TOI Science Desk, we are not just reporters; we are storytellers of scientific narratives. We are committed to demystifying the intricacies of science, making it accessible and engaging for readers of all backgrounds. Join us as we craft knowledge with precision and passion, bringing you on a journey where the mysteries of the universe unfold with every word. Read More
